DECLARATION OF ROWENA GARGALICANA IN SUPPORT OF OPPOSITION TO MOTION FOR PREFERENTIAL TRIAL SETTING (DECLARATIONS) (TRANSACTION ID # 75673389) FILED BY DEFENDANT 363 GRANT AVENUE ASSOCIATES LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY MASON, MARK ANTHONY , AN INDIVIDUAL

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON MAR-04-2025 AT 9:30AM IN DEPARTMENT 206 - PLAINTIFFS' MOTION FOR PREFERENTIAL TRIAL SETTING. PHILIP J. SCIRANKA, ESQ. APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFFS. ROWENA GARGALICANA, ESQ. APPEARING FOR DEFENDANTS 363 GRANT AVENUE ASSOCIATES LLC AND MARK ANTHONY MASON. NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. AFTER ARGUMENT, THE COURT DENIES PLAINTIFFS' MOTION FOR PREFERENTIAL TRIAL SETTING. PLAINTIFFS FAILED TO SHOW THAT MR. MCCLOSKEY HAS SUBSTANTIAL INTEREST IN THE LITIGATION AS A WHOLE. COURT WILL PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE: ROCHELLE C. EAST; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
